issue_summary: Populated throws clause of FieldVector, ArrayFieldVector, SparseFieldVector . Added some missing precondition checks. Corrected some mistakes in javadoc.
javadoc_after:
/** * Map an addition operation to each entry. *

The instance is changed by this method.

* @param d value to be added to each entry * @return for convenience, return {@code this} * @throws NullArgumentException if {@code d} is {@code null}. */
